keyPoints: Model-View-Controller (MVC) to separate concerns and improve maintainability
Keep it Simple, Stupid (KISS) to avoid unnecessary complexity
Test-Driven Development (TDD) to ensure unit tests are written before code is written
Separation of Concerns (SoC) to reduce coupling between modules and improve scalability
Code Reviews to ensure code is reviewed by peers before it's merged into the main codebase
Continuous Integration (CI) to automate testing and ensure code is built and tested before it's deployed
